verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the unanimous consensus across all agents. The synthesis explicitly listed the specific evidence from each domain (linguistic, landscape, botanics, regulatory, meta) and correctly noted the refinement of the location to Mato Grosso do Sul (MS) and Rodovia 267 in Round 2. The reasoning is clear, evidence-based, and fully supported by the image.
